persona.name: Olivia Williams
persona.motivations_goals: Read as many books as possible and eventually become a writer
persona.communication_style: Articulate, uses literary references, thinks before speaking
persona.backstory: Has kept a journal since she was eight and prefers the company of books to most people

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

surrounding_conversation.content: Let’s go to hallway1! Stay together!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jason Miller

actions.plan: I should head to the library to find a new book to read during lunch. It's quiet there, and I can immerse myself in a good story.

actions.dialog_text: James, we need to hide. Stay quiet.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make things worse, so I’ll stay here and hide. I hope James is okay.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is east of here. I’m safer staying still and hidden in this hallway. Moving could draw attention, and I don’t know where the shooter might go next.

actions.dialog_text: Robert, Margaret, David, stay here. It’s safer than moving.
actions.plan: The shooter is still in the cafeteria, and people are panicking. Jason wants to go to hallway1, but I think staying here is safer. Moving could make us targets.

memories.description: Decided to go to the library to find a new book to read during lunch, as I prefer the quiet and solitude there.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in hallway2, believing movement would increase danger. Whispered to James to stay quiet and hide.
Learned the shooter is in the cafeteria, east of hallway2. Decided to remain hidden and still, fearing movement could attract attention.
Noticed Jason suggesting moving to hallway1 but decided to stay in hallway2, believing it’s safer. Whispered to Robert, Margaret, and David to stay still.
